MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection and produce documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $556 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
